per_criterion_scores.internal_note: Commands were generally clear but missed specificity in confirming the algorithm and citing evidence.
Some improvements were made, but critical issues remained unaddressed.
Demonstrated understanding of algorithmic principles but did not fully leverage them to guide the AI to confirm the algorithm or cite evidence.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding with some clear commands and iterative improvements, but missed critical specificity and full leverage of algorithmic principles.
